title: Detection of ATG13-WIPI3 Interaction in Stable Cell Lines
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i5pg","text":"To detect the interaction of ATG13 with WIPI3 in various stable cell lines using co-immunoprecipitation (Co-IP) and subsequent analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"dad9v","text":"Use gloves and goggles when handling reagents and biological materials. Dispose of all waste according to institutional biosafety guidelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"97a79","text":"10 cm culture dishes (Sterile, tissue culture treated) - 4
Co-IP lysis buffer (Pre-chilled, 50 mM Tris-HCl, pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 10 mM EDTA, 5% glycerol, 1% NP-40) - 50 mL
EBSS (Earle's Balanced Salt Solution) - 50 mL
SDS loading buffer (2× concentration) - 10 mL
Lipofectamine 2000 (Transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher, cat. #11668019)) - 20 μL
pCAG-TSF-GFP-WIPI3 (Plasmid for transfection) - 10 μg
Pierce™ Anti-HA Magnetic Beads (For immunoprecipitation (Thermo, 88836)) - 100 μL

Reagents:
Buffer Co-IP lysis buffer - Buffer for cell lysis and protein extraction
Buffer SDS loading buffer - Buffer for protein denaturation
Protease Inhibitor Protease inhibitor cocktail - Inhibits protease activity during lysis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Seed ATG13-KO+Halo-LC3, ATG13-KO+Halo-LC3+HA-ATG13-WT, and ATG13-KO+Halo-LC3+HA-ATG13-(HF|DD) stable cell lines into 10 cm dishes at a density of 1 × 10⁵ cells/mL.
Transfect cells with 10 μg of pCAG-TSF-GFP-WIPI3 plasmid using Lipofectamine 2000 at a DNA:lipid ratio of 1:2.
Replace the medium with fresh medium 2 hours before treatment with EBSS for 1 hour.
Harvest cells using pre-chilled Co-IP lysis buffer.
Add 1 mL of Co-IP lysis buffer to the cell pellet and incubate on ice for 1 hour.
Centrifuge at 13,000 × g for 10 minutes at 4°C. Save 1/20 of the supernatant as input.
Incubate the remaining supernatant with 100 μL of Pierce™ Anti-HA Magnetic Beads at 4°C overnight.
Wash the bead-protein complexes five times with Co-IP lysis buffer, 10 minutes per wash.
Elute bound proteins by boiling in 2× SDS loading buffer for 10 minutes.
Resolve the eluted proteins by SDS-PAGE.
Load 10 μL of eluted fractions onto a 15% polyacrylamide gel and run the gel according to standard protocols.
creator: Yongjia Duan
